maps.title: MAP: Follow applicable to the banks
maps.objective: To ensure follow the extant guidelines applicable to the banks on capital adequacy requirements and risk management

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Follow applicable to the banks
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Follow applicable to the banks'. Document the existing Policy posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: The banks undertaking PD activities departmentally should follow the extant guidelines
applicable to the banks on capital adequacy requirements and risk management.

tasks.title: Draft or update policy for: Follow applicable to the banks
tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'Follow applicable to the banks'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Obtain Board/Management approval for policy: Follow applicable to the banks
tasks.description: Present the drafted policy for 'Follow applicable to the banks' to the Board or Senior Management for formal ratification. Record approval in the Board/Committee meeting minutes. Ensure the approved policy is version-controlled and stored in the policy repository.
tasks.expected_evidence: Board resolution or Committee minutes referencing policy approval
tasks.implementation_notes: Approval must be captured in formal minutes, not email.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Follow applicable to the banks
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Follow applicable to the banks'. Required evidence types: Approved Policy Document. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Approved Policy Document
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Follow applicable to the banks
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Follow applicable to the banks' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Policy Review. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Follow applicable to the banks
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Follow applicable to the banks'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be level of management with

tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be level of management with
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be level of management with' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient.
